CustomField.formula: IF( AND( OR( ROUND(NATT_Margin__c * 100, 2) < ROUND(QMargin_DOS_Lower_Bound__c * 100, 2), ROUND(NATT_Margin__c * 100, 2) < 0 ), $Permission.Margin_FLag_Access ), IMAGE( LEFT($Api.Partner_Server_URL_530, FIND("/services", $Api.Partner_Server_URL_530) - 1) & "/resource/BlackFlag", "black", 60, 60 ), IF( AND( ROUND(NATT_Margin__c * 100, 2) >= ROUND(QMargin_DOS_Lower_Bound__c * 100, 2), ROUND(NATT_Margin__c * 100, 2) < ROUND(QMargin_RD_Lower_Bound__c * 100, 2), $Permission.Margin_FLag_Access ), IMAGE( LEFT($Api.Partner_Server_URL_530, FIND("/services", $Api.Partner_Server_URL_530) - 1) & "/img/samples/flag_red.gif", "red", 30, 30 ), IF( AND( ROUND(NATT_Margin__c * 100, 2) >= ROUND(QMargin_RD_Lower_Bound__c * 100, 2), ROUND(NATT_Margin__c * 100, 2) < ROUND(QMargin_EAM_Lower_Bound__c * 100, 2), $Permission.Margin_FLag_Access ), IMAGE( LEFT($Api.Partner_Server_URL_530, FIND("/services", $Api.Partner_Server_URL_530) - 1) & "/img/samples/flag_yellow.gif", "yellow", 30, 30 ), IF( AND( ROUND(NATT_Margin__c * 100, 2) >= ROUND(QMargin_EAM_Lower_Bound__c * 100, 2), $Permission.Margin_FLag_Access ), IMAGE( LEFT($Api.Partner_Server_URL_530, FIND("/services", $Api.Partner_Server_URL_530) - 1) & "/img/samples/flag_green.gif", "green", 30, 30 ), null ) ) ) )
CustomField.label: Margin Flag
